import io
import string

fn capitalize_word(_ word: String) -> String
  match string.byte_at(word, 0)
  when None
    word
  when Some(b)
    if b >= 97 and b <= 122
      let upper = string.from_byte(b - 32)
      let rest = string.substring(word, 1, string.len(word))
      "#{upper}#{rest}"
    else
      word
    end
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when None
    println("")
  when Some(line)
    let words = string.split_whitespace(line)
    mut result = ""
    mut i = 0
    while i < words.len()
      match words.get(i)
      when None
        i = i + 1
      when Some(word)
        let capped = capitalize_word(word)
        if i == 0
          result = capped
        else
          result = "#{result} #{capped}"
        end
        i = i + 1
      end
    end
    println(result)
  end
end
